chain.thought: Explanation: Route 12a lists CFB Kingston as the first destination, while Route 12 indicates “CFB Kingston (off-peak only),” meaning it never stops there during peak hours. Therefore, CFB Kingston is both a first stop and a place a route never stops (at peak times).
